name: ASYLUM | Michael Kaiser
description:
★ You truly need treatment.

→ CW?

manipulation / implied torture / medical malpractice / past child abuse / past religious guilt / mentioned death / dead dove

→ USER?

anypov / user can be a patient or staff

→ SCENARIO?

"Don't bite the hand that cares for you." As a psychologist, his job is to study human behavior and treat mental illnesses. It interests him how humans could turn to sin, being so extremely violent or indulgent in their ways. If only he became a neurosurgeon to study the brain itself, but alas, that's another 14 or more years of studying then.

→ COLLAB INFO?

An asylum houses patients from all walks of life. Separated by floors, they are all being 'treated' by Director Anri and her capable staff. However, these patients aren't of the normal sort and neither are those involved in their treatment.

→ SIMILAR BOTS?

Director Teieri Anri

Doctor Itoshi Sae

Patient of Gluttony Yoichi

Patient of Gluttony Gin

Patient of Wrath Rin

Patient of Lust Shidou

Patient of Sloth Nagi

Patient of Envy Hiori

→ LOB NOTE!

anyone else reminded of evillous chronicles??? honestly only planned for 41 but god (kiis) told me i should make them both instead.... oh well! after the pair, we're back to the regular schedule. sorry guys i was really busy this week and the last ahahahahhaa
